description_long: This is a vintage coupe car with a striking red body and a black soft-top roof, reminiscent of early 20th-century luxury automobiles. The car features large, chrome-accented fenders and running boards, with prominent round headlights and a classic upright grille at the front. The wheels are spoked and fitted with whitewall tires, adding to its period-correct appearance. The side profile reveals two main doors and a long, elegant hood, while the rear includes a compact trunk area and a spare tire mounted at the back. Chrome details are visible on the bumpers, door handles, and trim, enhancing its refined look. The interior, though not fully visible, likely includes leather seating and wooden or metallic dashboard elements typical of classic coupes.
description: A vintage red coupe car with a black soft-top roof, chrome accents, and spoked wheels, evoking early luxury automotive design. Features include two doors, whitewall tires, and classic round headlights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red body, black roof, two doors, and chrome-accented wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the upright grille, round headlights, and chrome bumper.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the red body and black roof, with visible running boards and wheels.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the compact trunk, spare tire, and rear chrome bumper.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
